title: cyclosorus elmerorum
intro: Cyclosorus elmerorum, also known as the Elmer's cyclosorus fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus elmerorum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
